name: basic-genai-tower-defense
description: A turn-based medieval tower defense game with procedurally generated pixel art sprites, built with vanilla JS and HTML5 Canvas.

scripts.generate:sprites: node js/level-generators/generate-grass-sprites.js && node js/level-generators/generate-border-sprites.js && node js/level-generators/generate-water-sprites.js && node js/level-generators/generate-oak-sprites.js && node js/level-generators/generate-castle-sprites.js && node js/level-generators/generate-large-sprites.js && node js/level-generators/generate-road-sprite.js && node js/level-generators/generate-structure-sprites.js
scripts.generate: npm run generate:sprites && npm run generate:level
scripts.init: npm install && npm run generate && echo '\nReady! Run: npm run serve'
